creator: ja103@dock.net
text:
make pretty-print-build-depends-list and 
make pretty-print-runs-depends-list
fails for ports/java/diablo-jdk15 with error:

printf: illegal option -- n
usage: printf format [arguments ...]
*** Error code 1
Stop in /usr/ports/java/diablo-jdk15.


make pretty-print-[build/run]-depends-list
works for ports/x11/gnome2

Updating ports to date:2007:11:10:00:00:00 doesn't fix the problem

How-To-Repeat: 
On  Fresh New Installation 
root> cd /usr/ports/java/diablo-jdk15
root> make pretty-print-build-depends-list

printf: illegal option -- n
usage: printf format [arguments ...]
*** Error code 1
Stop in /usr/ports/java/diablo-jdk15.

The same will happen for pretty-print-run-depends-list
